name: tautulli
description: Read Plex viewing activity, watch history, home stats, and users from Tautulli via its API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

interface.longDescription: Read Plex viewing activity, watch history, home stats, and users from Tautulli via its API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.
defaultPrompt: What's playing on Plex right now?
Top users this week in Tautulli.
